items.summary: In SwarmDetailView, when the Yes or No plus button is clicked to open the CreateLawTokenDialog, automatically pass the currently displayed swarm's ID as the parent swarm ID into the dialog's creation call. The swarm ID must be read directly from the swarm detail view's own state/props — no user input or confirmation required. The dialog must call the backend's law token creation function with this swarm ID correctly populated so that the 'Parent Swarm does not exist' error no longer occurs.
